name: tournament-management-api
description: A REST API for creating and managing Tournaments, Participants, and Matches.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.json && mkdir -p dist && cp bracket.ejs dist/bracket.ejs
scripts.sim-single-elim: npm run build && node simulate-tournament.js single_elimination
scripts.sim-double-elim: npm run build && node simulate-tournament.js double_elimination
scripts.sim-round-robin: npm run build && node simulate-tournament.js round_robin
scripts.sim-swiss: npm run build && node simulate-tournament.js swiss
scripts.sim-ladder: npm run build && node simulate-tournament.js ladder
